title: Analysis — definition of one analysis KIND (vocabulary, not per-result)
description: One entry in the analysis registry. Defines what `ngsrelate`, `ngspedigree`, `mendelian`, `fst_pairwise`, `theta_pi`, etc. ARE: their inputs (set entity types + artifact entity types), parameters schema, output layer type, status, and version. The CATALOGUE. Distinct from analysis_result_v1.schema.json (per-result lookup row pointing at a layer) and from operation_entry.schema.json (per-server-endpoint definition). One JSON file per analysis under <registry_root>/analyses/<analysis_id>.json. The flat catalogue analysis_registry.tsv is generated from these by lib/registry_index.py. Per SETS_AND_ANALYSES.md §'The analysis registry'.

analysis_id.description: Stable id. Convention: short lowercase tag (ngsrelate, ngspedigree, mendelian, fst_pairwise, theta_pi, ngsadmix_global, ngsadmix_local, hobs_windowed). Used 1:1 as analysis_result_v1.analysis_id and as action_manifest.type after the 'run_' prefix is stripped.

analysis_version.description: Semver-ish tag for the analysis definition itself (NOT the engine binary version — that's recorded per-result in provenance.engine_version). Bumping this invalidates older results catalogued under the older version.

description.description: One-paragraph: what does this analysis compute, what is the biological question, what does the output mean?

inputs.description: What the analysis CONSUMES. Two kinds: 'sets' (entity sets the analysis runs against — sample set, site set, window set) and 'artifacts' (specific input layer types — beagle file, sites file, ngsRelate result for downstream steps).

sets.description: Required entity sets. Each entry names a role and the entity_type the role expects.

role.description: Role name within the analysis: 'samples', 'sites', 'windows', 'parents_only', etc.

entity_type.description: Required entity_type for this role (per entity_type_v1).

cardinality.description: How many sets of this role (e.g. fst_pairwise needs 'two' sample sets).

artifacts.description: Required upstream layer types (each is a layer_envelope schema_version this analysis consumes as INPUT). E.g. ngsRelate needs a 'beagle_file_v1' artifact + a 'sites_file_v1' artifact.

params_schema.description: Path to the schema_in/<analysis_id>_v<N>.schema.json that validates the params block of action manifests for this analysis. Null when no parameters.

produces.description: Output layer types this analysis emits. Each entry names the schema_out/ schema; matched 1:1 with action_manifest.expected_outputs.

engine.description: Tag of the underlying compute engine (e.g. 'ngsRelate', 'ngsPedigree', 'angsd_patched', 'region_popstats', 'instant_q', 'ngsadmix'). Informational; the actual binary path comes from master_config.engines.<name>.

engine_repo.description: Optional URL or path to the engine's source (e.g. 'unified_ancestry/engines/fst_dxy/region_popstats').

endpoint.description: Optional. If the analysis is fronted by an atlas_server.py HTTP endpoint, the path (e.g. '/api/popstats/groupwise'). Null for analyses that run via a non-HTTP runner.

default_runner.description: Optional default runner module path (e.g. 'runners.ngsrelate.run'). Atlases may override in their actions.registry.json.

requires.description: Other analysis_ids whose outputs this analysis takes as artifacts (informational dependency hint; the actual upstream layer is in inputs.artifacts).

_examples.label: ngsRelate — pairwise relatedness from genotype likelihoods
_examples.description: Estimates pairwise relatedness coefficients (theta, IBS0/1/2, KING) from a BEAGLE genotype-likelihood file restricted to a sites file. Per-pair scores for all N×(N-1)/2 sample pairs.
_examples.intended_use: kinship QC, family detection, pedigree input

_examples._description: ngsPedigree definition (depends on an ngsrelate_result upstream).
_examples.description: Builds the most-likely pedigree from a pairwise-relatedness matrix.

_examples._description: Mendelian inheritance check (depends on a pedigree).
_examples.description: Per-trio Mendelian-error rate from genotype calls along the genome. Inputs: pedigree (trios) + BEAGLE / genotype likelihoods.
Window-wise pairwise FST between TWO sample sets. Wraps region_popstats (the existing /api/popstats/groupwise endpoint).
